title: FLUX.1 Serverless (diffusers)
description: Text to image with FLUX.1 on Runpod Serverless. A pure diffusers handler, no ComfyUI and no web UI. JSON in, base64 PNG out, scales to zero between requests. Optional 8 bit quantization runs FLUX.1-dev on a 24GB GPU.

input.name: Hugging Face model
input.description: FLUX repo on Hugging Face. FLUX.1-dev is gated and needs a token with license access. FLUX.1-schnell is ungated.

input.name: Hugging Face token
input.description: Read token from huggingface.co/settings/tokens. Required for gated models like FLUX.1-dev. Leave blank for schnell.

input.name: 8 bit quantization
input.description: Quantize the transformer and T5 text encoder to qfloat8. Fits FLUX.1-dev on a 24GB GPU at a small quality cost.

input.name: Default inference steps
input.description: Used when a request omits num_inference_steps. 28 to 50 for dev, 4 for schnell.

input.name: Default guidance scale
input.description: Used when a request omits guidance_scale. Around 3.5 for dev, 0 for schnell.
